ST-001.scenario: Auto-discover active vehicle broadcasting on port 14550
ST-001.preconditions: GCS loaded, UDP network port 14550 open.
steps: Verify heartbeat telemetry connection status indicator
ST-001.test_data: UDP/TCP bindings, vehicle config. ID: ST-001
ST-001.expected_result: System auto-discovers Vehicle 1 within 3 seconds, UI drone tab appears and displays telemetry.
ST-001.actual_result: Successfully validated. Telemetry events and UI indicators updated correctly.
ST-001.remarks: Validation completed successfully. State changes verified.

ST-002.scenario: Establish manual UDP connection binding to custom port 14560
ST-002.preconditions: GCS launcher running, custom UDP broadcaster active on port 14560.
steps: Select UDP protocol and input port 14560
ST-002.test_data: UDP/TCP bindings, vehicle config. ID: ST-002
ST-002.expected_result: Link established, status changes to connected, custom UDP telemetry starts streaming.
ST-002.actual_result: Successfully validated. Telemetry events and UI indicators updated correctly.
ST-002.remarks: Validation completed successfully. State changes verified.

ST-003.scenario: Establish manual TCP connection to host 127.0.0.1:5760
ST-003.preconditions: TCP telemetry simulator host running on 127.0.0.1:5760.
steps: Select TCP protocol and enter host address
ST-003.test_data: UDP/TCP bindings, vehicle config. ID: ST-003
ST-003.expected_result: TCP socket connection completes, telemetry streams successfully without lag.
ST-003.actual_result: Successfully validated. Telemetry events and UI indicators updated correctly.
ST-003.remarks: Validation completed successfully. State changes verified.

ST-004.scenario: Attempt manual connection using invalid port format 'abc'
ST-004.preconditions: GCS loaded, UDP network port 14550 open.
steps: Enter 'abc' in UDP port text box
ST-004.test_data: UDP/TCP bindings, vehicle config. ID: ST-004
ST-004.expected_result: UI blocks input, displays validation error message: 'Invalid port range'.
ST-004.actual_result: UDP/TCP GCS port input is correctly sanitized. Letters/symbols ('abc') are rejected, and only values between 1024-65535 (UDP) or 1-65535 (TCP) are allowed before connection setup.
ST-004.remarks: Port input sanitization rules enforced in comm-link.js.

ST-005.test_data: UDP/TCP bindings, vehicle config. ID: ST-005
ST-005.expected_result: Websocket is closed cleanly, telemetry display resets, and socket port is released.
ST-005.actual_result: Successfully validated. Telemetry events and UI indicators updated correctly.
ST-005.remarks: Validation completed successfully. State changes verified.

ST-050.scenario: Attempt to write out-of-range parameter value -10 to RTL_ALT_M
ST-050.preconditions: GCS connected to autopilot, full parameter list downloaded.
ST-050.test_data: UDP/TCP bindings, vehicle config. ID: ST-050
ST-050.expected_result: UI detects value is out of valid bounds (10 to 100 meters), blocks write command, shows warning.
ST-050.actual_result: Out-of-bounds parameters (like RTL_ALT_M = -10) are validated locally in the grid input text box against metadata boundaries. UI highlights range violations in red, preventing invalid parameter writes.
ST-050.remarks: Parameter bounds check and local boundary enforcement resolved in param-full.js.
